title: spirillus interruptus
intro: Spirillus interruptus is a species of flowering plant, also known as the interrupted spirillus, that is native to certain regions of the world. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spirillus interruptus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Spirillus interruptus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations, such as capsules or salves.
